repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion/equality boundary and conditional margin already supply the nested-support bookkeeping

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021 common-restriction LP/VAR equivalence; DrautzburgWright2023 independence-refined sign-restricted VAR sets
none; verified comparators cover LP/VAR equivalence, non-Gaussian SVAR labeling, and independence-refined sign sets, but not an LP/sign versus non-Gaussian SVAR mechanism threshold
none; Guay2021 gives higher-moment identification conditions and Read2022 gives sign/zero algorithms, not a residual-to-support-gap lower bound

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: AnttonenLanneLuoto2024 is unstable: the bibliography gives the 2024 potentially non-Gaussian title but DOI 10.2139/ssrn.4358059 points to the 2023 SSRN paper; the 2024 potentially non-Gaussian version is SSRN 4804325.

novelty_flags.label: upgrade_review
novelty_flags.one_line: Mechanism rubric is only partially delivered: the delta_summary promises a positive operational threshold tau_w^*(P), but the displayed definition cannot be positive finite when LP support maximizers are not SVAR-compatible.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship comparator chain cites PlagborgMollerWolf2021, LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017, DrautzburgWright2023, and AnttonenLanneLuoto2024 without section, equation, page, or quoted gap anchors.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The lower-bound claim cites Guay2021 and Read2022 without location-level anchors tying either paper to the missing residual-to-support-gap bound.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until tau_w^*(P) is redefined as a genuine finite threshold and the parent chi_w(P) reduction is algebraic rather than assumed.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: As defined, tau_w^*(P) requires the entire LP exposed face to be a subset of Q_SVAR(P); if Delta_w(P)>0 this is impossible for every tau, so tau_w^*(P) is infinite/undefined rather than a positive computable scalar.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The bound Delta_w(P) >= c_w(P) tau_w^*(P) inherits the ill-posed tau definition, so the proposed positive-gap modulus has no finite target as written.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The conclusion about recovering the parent margin chi_w(P) uses the channel-collapse specialization, but Assumption channel-collapse is not included in Theorem 1's hypotheses.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The parent reduction is asserted through Assumption channel-collapse rather than derived from the displayed tau_w^*(P) definition; under the current inclusion-based tau definition it does not algebraically reduce to chi_w(P).

soundness_flags.label: Common restrictions corollary
soundness_flags.one_line: Removing the fourth-cumulant restriction does not make L_delta4 + Pi identically zero under the existing definitions; the feasible sets or mechanism score must be explicitly redefined for this reduction.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal names the three intended mechanisms, but the operational threshold and parent-corner reduction do not yet work mathematically.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine tau_w^*(P) as a finite distance or residual over the LP exposed face, such as the minimum mechanism score of incompatible maximizers or the support loss to a cumulant-contact envelope, and restate Conjectures 1-2 around that object.
Add an explicit algebraic parent-corner derivation showing exactly how E_w, L_delta4, and Pi collapse to chi_w(P), rather than making the identity an assumption.
Repair the AnttonenLanneLuoto2024 bibliography entry by choosing either SSRN 4358059/2023 or SSRN 4804325/2024 and aligning the title, year, DOI, and body claims.
Add location-level anchors in each §8 why-new block for the comparator claims, especially PlagborgMollerWolf2021, DrautzburgWright2023, Guay2021, and Read2022.

recommended_next_step: Revise the tau_w^*(P) definition first, then update the parent reduction and bibliography before rerunning novelty review.
